description: Comprehensive contamination dataset for Beryllium Oxide Contamination. Includes chemical composition, safety metrics, PPE requirements, and laser removal parameters for effective contamination removal.

includedInDataCatalog.name: Z-Beam Contamination Removal Database
includedInDataCatalog.description: Comprehensive database of contamination removal parameters, safety data, and laser cleaning specifications

contaminant.name: Beryllium Oxide Contamination
contaminant.description: Beryllium oxide forms during high-temperature exposure in aerospace processes, so contamination builds as hard, toxic layer on metal surfaces. This differs from other oxides because toxicity poses health risks, and adhesion varies stronger on copper-beryllium alloy than steel. Removal challenges include avoiding substrate damage from its durability, but laser cleaning works effectively after precise pulsing, so contaminants ablate cleanly without residue.

fireExplosionRisk.description: Minimal fire risk with standard precautions and adequate ventilation
fireExplosionRisk.mitigation: Standard fire safety precautions, extinguisher available within 15m

toxicGasRisk.description: Beryllium Oxide and Beryllium generation - multiple toxic compounds
toxicGasRisk.mitigation: Full-face respirator with appropriate cartridges, gas detection system, medical monitoring

visibilityHazard.description: Moderate visibility reduction (40-60%), significant particulate haze
visibilityHazard.mitigation: Ensure clear sight lines, use source extraction, maintain awareness of surroundings

ventilationRequirements.rationale: Enhanced ventilation required due to toxic gas generation - 15 ACH with HEPA
